name: Maqqie Platform Public API
description:
### Introduction

The public API of the Maqqie Platform makes it possible for third parties to integrate their applications with the Maqqie Platform.

The endpoints are grouped by:

* Sub domain: a specific and coherent sub set of entities of the Maqqie platform.
* Role: the allowed operations and the semantics of these operations differs per role. 

See the [glossary](glossary.html) for an explanation of the terms used in this API.

All endpoints require credentials. If you need access to the API, please send a request for an account to the [public API team](mailto:public-api-support@maqqie.nl). Once you have received the client credentials, access tokens can be requested at: [https://maqqie.app/auth/realms/maqqie/protocol/openid-connect/token](https://maqqie.app/auth/realms/maqqie/protocol/openid-connect/token)
